name: Wire Shoe Space-Saving Slot Organizers 6pk - Brightroom™
description:
Save space when organizing your collection of shoes with the Wire Shoe Space-Saving Slot Organizers from Brightroom™. This pack of six shoe organizers features a wired design to add a sleek style to your space. Made of metal, this shoe organizer set is ground freestanding and a perfect addition to your home decor.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
